summary: Mutation testing results: 6 killed, 0 survived, 0 no coverage
testQuality: Perfect mutation score of 100%. All 6 mutants were killed across push-auth.ts. Tests cover conditional expression mutations, equality operator mutations, string literal mutations, block statement mutations, and object literal mutations. The 4 tests thoroughly exercise session token path (with teamId/projectId), push token path (without teamId/projectId), error propagation from resolveAuth, and unknown token type handling.
